characters.name: Bobby
characters.description: BobbyGeneral informationName:BobbyProfession:ActorPortrayed by:Wesley Taylor Bobbyis one ofIvy's close friends. It is unknown how they know each other, possibly that he works on Heaven on Earth along with her,JessicaandDennis. He auditioned forMarilyn: The Musicaland was selected to be in the chorus. He keeps away fromKarenand is unfriendly when they first meet, but he offers to teach her, along with Jessica, and Dennis, about how to be in the chorus, along with get her into his dancing class. During the course of the Season, it can be seen that he andDennishave a flirtatious relationship the further the season goes, hugging, sitting in each other's laps.He also flirts withKylein season two although nothing else happens between them.

characters.name: Colin
characters.description: ColinGeneral informationName:ColinRelationships:Rebecca Duvall(ex-girlfriend)Portrayed by:Marcus Schenkenberg ColinisRebecca Duvall's ex-boyfriend. He is first seen when he storms into the rehearsal space, and aggressively threatens Ms.Duvall. His only appearance is inSeason Onein the episodeThe Movie Star.

characters.name: Daisy Parker
characters.description: Daisy ParkerGeneral informationName:Daisy ParkerProfession:Actress, Dancer, Pilates teacherRelationships:Derek Wills(one night stand)Portrayed by:Mara DaviDaisy Parkeris a character who makes her debut in thesecond seasonofSmash. She is portrayed by Broadway actress Mara Davi. Daisy makes her first appearance in "The Fallout", the second episode of the season. Derek confronts Daisy at the Pilates class she teaches. He claims that her allegations of sexual harassment against him are untrue, whereas she recalls that she had to go through four callbacks toSweet Charityand when she finally refused to sleep with him she mysteriously lost out on the job. Daisy reappears in this episode, apologizing to Derek for the allegations made last fall. She admits she only made them because she knew her career was failing, so she thought they would get her back out there. Derek then invites her back to his place, after being rejected byIvy.

characters.name: Daisy Parker

She admits she only made them because she knew her career was failing, so she thought they would get her back out there. Derek then invites her back to his place, after being rejected byIvy.

characters.name: Dennis
characters.description: DennisGeneral informationName:DennisProfession:Actor/DancerRelationships:Ivy(Friend)Bobby(friend)Karen(friend)Sue(friend)Sue(friend)Sam(friend)Portrayed by:Phillip Spaeth First seen inPilot, he is currently starring in 'Bombshell' as a chorus member and Understudy to DiMaggio. He is first seen in the Pilot, flirting with Tom. He plays a larger role inThe Callbacksonwards. During the course of the Season, it can be seen that he andBobbyhave a flirtatious relationship the further the season goes, hugging, sitting in each other's laps.

characters.name: Derek Wills
characters.description: Derek WillsGeneral informationName:Derek WillsProfession:DirectorFamily:Unborn child withIvyRelationships:Rebecca Duval(one night stand)Karen Cartwright(Kissed once; Friends now)Ivy Lynn(girlfriend, having a child together)Portrayed by:Jack DavenportDerek Wills(played byJack Davenport) is a Tony and Olivier Award-winning Broadway director who recently signed on to direct aproject based on the life of Marilyn Monroe, with early collaboratorTom Levitt.The relationship between Tom and Derek is strained from slights that occurred the last time they worked together.JuliaandEileenhowever, have no problem with Derek. Derek andIvybegin sleeping together duringCallback,when she becomes Marilyn. They have relationship problems all through the season before they finally break up. Derek is a diva who does not enjoy collaboration, and resents any attempt to challenge his authority in 'his' show. This leads to conflicts with all the other members of the creative team, though in most cases Derek winds up getting his own way. A true son of the West End, Derek Wills spent his childhood shadowing his father, Charles Wills, a well-known orchestral flautist. Karen Cartwright(Kissed once; Friends now)Ivy Lynn(girlfriend, having a child together) he is currently dating Ivy Lynn.

A true son of the West End, Derek Wills spent his childhood shadowing his father, Charles Wills, a well-known orchestral flautist. characters.name: Devan Sundaram
characters.description: Dev SundaramGeneral informationName:Devan "Dev" SundaramProfession:Deputy Press Secretary (Mayor's office)Relationships:Karen Cartwright(ex-fiance)Ivy Lynn(one night stand)Portrayed by:Raza JaffreyDevan "Dev" Sundaram(played byRaza Jaffrey) was born in Wimbledon in the United Kingdom, but has split his time with relatives in Queens for much of his life and has lived in New York City for several years. With a B.A. in Classics and Political Science from Oxford University and M.A.s in Communications (from Columbia University) and International Relations and Journalism (from NYU), Dev has worked as Deputy Press Secretary in Mayor Mike Bloomberg's office since 2010.[1]  Currently the Deputy Press Secretary in Mayor Mike Bloomberg's office.

characters.name: Devan Sundaram
characters.description: Dev SundaramGeneral informationName:Devan "Dev" SundaramProfession:Deputy Press Secretary (Mayor's office)Relationships:Karen Cartwright(ex-fiance)Ivy Lynn(one night stand)Portrayed by:Raza JaffreyDevan "Dev" Sundaram(played byRaza Jaffrey) was born in Wimbledon in the United Kingdom, but has split his time with relatives in Queens for much of his life and has lived in New York City for several years. With a B.A. in Classics and Political Science from Oxford University and M.A.s in Communications (from Columbia University) and International Relations and Journalism (from NYU), Dev has worked as Deputy Press Secretary in Mayor Mike Bloomberg's office since 2010.[1]  Currently the Deputy Press Secretary in Mayor Mike Bloomberg's office.

characters.name: Eileen Rand
characters.description: Eileen RandGeneral informationName:Eileen RandProfession:ProducerFamily:Katie Rand (daughter)Relationships:Jerry Rand (ex-husband)Portrayed by:Anjelica HustonEileen Rand(played byAnjelica Huston) is an adjunct professor in both the Theatre and Film MFA divisions at Columbia University. In 1994, Rand founded the Eileen and Jerome Rand Scholarship at Juilliard for actors showing exceptional talent and promise. In 2009, Rand received a commendation from the New York City Council for her support of the arts and her humanitarian efforts with underprivileged youth. Rand has been listed in New York Magazine's list of the 100 most influential women in New York City twice, in 2006 and 2011. In 2012, Rand starts production on aHouston-Levittproject based on the life of Marilyn Monroe. She currently lives on the Lower East Side.

characters.name: Frank Houston
characters.description: FrankGeneral informationName:FrankRelationships:Julia Houston(wife),Leo Houston(son)Portrayed by:Brian d'Arcy JamesFrank(played byBrian d'Arcy James) is the husband of songwriter/lyricistJulia Houston. Frank is concerned that his wife's new project will hinder their efforts to adopt a second child. Frank then finds out that Julia cheated on him.

characters.name: Ivy Lynn
characters.description: Ivy LynnGeneral informationName:Ivy LynnProfession:ActressFamily:Leigh Conroy(mother)Relationships:Derek Wills(boyfriend, father of her child)Devan Sundaram(one night stand)Tom Levitt(Friend/Co-worker)Karen Cartwright(Frenemy)Portrayed by:Megan Hilty Ivy Lynn(played byMegan Hilty) is a seasoned veteran of Broadway, having performed in the ensemble of numerous hit shows. She is absolutely thrilled to have the chance to work on a new project with longtime friends and collaboratorsJulia HoustonandTom Levitt, based on the life of screen legend Marilyn Monroe. Ivy is worried she got the role of Marilyn Monroe because of her relationship with the director. Her friends tell her to stop thinking about it and enjoy the experience of a lifetime. However, Ivy gets replaced by movie star Rebecca Duval and is supposed to come back after Rebecca leaves, but Karen gets cast instead (by boyfriend, Derek Wills.) However, Karen quits the show to be inHit Listand Ivy is given the role again after her recent showLiaisons the Musicalcloses.

characters.name: Ivy Lynn
characters.description: Ivy LynnGeneral informationName:Ivy LynnProfession:ActressFamily:Leigh Conroy(mother)Relationships:Derek Wills(boyfriend, father of her child)Devan Sundaram(one night stand)Tom Levitt(Friend/Co-worker)Karen Cartwright(Frenemy)Portrayed by:Megan Hilty Ivy Lynn(played byMegan Hilty) is a seasoned veteran of Broadway, having performed in the ensemble of numerous hit shows. She is absolutely thrilled to have the chance to work on a new project with longtime friends and collaboratorsJulia HoustonandTom Levitt, based on the life of screen legend Marilyn Monroe. Ivy is worried she got the role of Marilyn Monroe because of her relationship with the director. Her friends tell her to stop thinking about it and enjoy the experience of a lifetime. However, Ivy gets replaced by movie star Rebecca Duval and is supposed to come back after Rebecca leaves, but Karen gets cast instead (by boyfriend, Derek Wills.) However, Karen quits the show to be inHit Listand Ivy is given the role again after her recent showLiaisons the Musicalcloses.

characters.name: Jessica
characters.description: JessicaGeneral informationName:JessicaProfession:Actress, DancerPortrayed by:Savannah WiseJessicais a Broadway actress and back up dancer, she currently works inHeaven on Earthas a dancer, along withIvyandDennis. She is first seen inPilotafter telling Ivy to calm down when she discovers she didn't get a part she had auditioned for. She and Bobby are best friends; one is rarely seen without the other. She has a small part in the first few episodes, mostly there to support Ivy during the callbacks, and when Ivy was having relationship problems. She plays a larger role inThe Cost of Artand starts off by being threatened by Karen, and with most of the other dancers call her a hick. After she watches Karen break down, she takes her to a store and she, along with Bobby, begin to befriend her. They teach her how to be a proper back up dancer and sing and performRumour Has It. After Karen confronts Jessica for being cruel to her, She and Jessica become best friends. It is possible that Jessica prefers Karen more than Ivy, despite then previously being best friends. Jessica and Karen are often seen together, giving each other advice about Boyfriend issues etc. Season One:

characters.name: Jimmy Collins
characters.description: Jimmy CollinsGeneral informationName:Jimmy CollinsProfession:Actor and MusicianFamily:Adam (Brother/Dealer)Father (Unknown)Mother (Deceased)Relationships:Kyle Bishop(Friend, Writing partner)Karen Cartwright(-Girlfriend)Portrayed by:Jeremy Jordan Father (Unknown)Mother (Deceased) Karen Cartwright(-Girlfriend) Jimmy is an abrasive, guarded and troubled young adult who spent a lot of his life dealing in relationships that were conditional or transactional, the only exception to this was Kyle. Sometimes viewed as selfish, abrasive, stubborn and as an asshole, he uses this behavior to push people away and protect himself from being hurt or let down, which is why it hurts so much when Karen and Derek consistently do so. He reacts to hurt and vulnerability with anger and disdain, and doesn’t necessarily communicate his feelings outside of expressing them through his music, or through action alone. In some ways, he’s emotionally stunted and incredibly unstable, he never felt safe and has been in a state of survival his whole life, from one addiction to the next. Jimmy is very sensitive to rejection and perceived abandonment, which are some of his main triggers. Unfortunately, Jimmy has a destructive streak, and although he had given up hard drugs for a while, he used weed often. His friendship with Kyle is often strained by his lack of impulse and harshness when he’s under the influence, or his entirely destructive and avoidant nature when he’s spiraling. But, that does not stop Kyle from taking care of him like family. When under the influence of cocaine, he tended to be more energetic, more impulsive and quick to anger, making split-second decisions and often saying things he’ll later regret. When someone gets close to Jimmy, though, he is kind, thoughtful and softer, as well as playful, goofy and loyal to a fault, risking his comfort and safety to make those he cares about, such as Kyle, happy.

characters.name: John Goodwin
characters.description: John GoodwinGeneral informationName:John GoodwinProfession:LawyerRelationships:Tom Levitt(ex-boyfriend)Portrayed by:Neal Bledsoe John Goodwinis a recurring character in Smash. He is first introduced inThe Cost of Art, after his andTom Levitt'smother, set the two on a date. From then the two were boyfriends. InThe Cost of Arthe is seen byTomto be a little boring, seeing him as a normal lawyer, but during their first date. He is taken by Tom to Derek's apartment, after they are called by Julia, and watch's the performance ofI've Never Met A Wolf Who Didn't Love to Howl. At the end, Tom is surprised that he finds that John found his piano playing the most interesting part of the performance.

characters.name: Julia Houston
characters.description: Julia HoustonGeneral informationName:Julia HoustonProfession:Songwriter/lyricistFamily:Frank Houston(ex-husband)Leo Houston(son)Unnamed parentsRelationships:Frank Houston(ex-husband)Tom Levitt(creative collaborator)Michael Swift(lover)Scott Nichols(ex-lover)Portrayed by:Debra Messing Julia Houstonis a bookwriter and lyricist best known for her joint ventures with her friend and colleagueTom Levitt.Marilyn: The Musicalwas her brainchild, and she is working with composer Tom (along with his assistant,Ellis Tancharoen), directorDerek Wills, and producerEileen Randto bring her idea to life on stage. There is so much tension between Julia and her husbandFrank, as they are in the process of adopting a child and Frank knows a new project will take up a lot of her time. Julia had an affair withMichael Swiftand he is still in love with her. After a while they realised that this would hurt both of their families so they soon decided to stop when Michael swift got cut from Bombshell. Even though Julia broke off her affair, she and her husband (Frank) still had troubles and by the end of season 2, they decide to get a divorce. Julia returns to her former lover Michael Swift after she won a Tony for Best Score with Tom. Julia's shows have been produced regionally and Off-Broadway at Playwrights Horizons, Roundabout, MCC, Second Stage, and the Public.

characters.description: Kyle BishopGeneral informationName:Kyle BishopProfession:Waiter, WriterRelationships:Jimmy Collins(writing partner, roommate)Blake (Ex-boyfriend)Tom Levitt(Lover)Portrayed by:Andy MientusKyle Bishopmade his first appearance inOn Broadway. He, with his friendJimmy Collins, was attempting to create a new rock musical. He and Jimmy were lifelong friends and lived together in Brooklyn. He died inThe Producersafter being hit by a bus. It is revealed that Kyle had a crush on Jimmy during his outburst in the same episode. Blake (Ex-boyfriend)Tom Levitt(Lover) Season Two:

characters.name: Lyle West
characters.description: Lyle WestGeneral informationName:Lyle WestProfession:Actor/SingerRelationships:Ivy Lynn(one night stand)Portrayed by:Nick JonasLyle West(played byNick Jonas) made an appearance in the episodes,The Cost of ArtandBombshell. He is said to be a "hot" sitcom star who started his career as a child actor on Broadway. Lyle is well known by bothDerek WillsandTom Levitt. Derek claims to have "discovered" him, but Tom begs to differ. Season One:

characters.name: Petey
characters.description: PeteyGeneral informationName:PeteyProfession:Actor, Dancer, SingerPortrayed by:Peter Rini Petey(played byPeter Rini) is a seasoned veteran of Broadway, having performed in the ensemble of numerous hit shows. He is absolutely thrilled to have the chance to work on a new project with Julia Houston and Tom Levitt, based on the life of screen legend Marilyn Monroe, playing Arthur Miller.

characters.name: R.J. Quigley
characters.description: R.J. QuigleyGeneral informationName:R.J. QuigleyProfession:Mayor Mike Bloomberg's office.Family:N/ARelationships:Dev Sundaram- Colleague / LoverPortrayed by:Tala AsheR.J. Quigleyis a recurring character inSmash. She is the beautiful colleague ofDev, whom she had an obvious crush on. Karen became noticeably jealous of R.J. when she and Dev were spending a great amount of time together.

characters.name: Rebecca Duvall
characters.description: Rebecca DuvallGeneral informationName:Rebecca DuvalProfession:Actress/SingerRelationships:Derek Wills(one night stand)Karen Cartwright(Friend)Portrayed by:Uma ThurmanRebecca Duvall (played byUma Thurman) is a Hollywood actress who wants to star inBombshelldespite having no theatrical ability. Initially, the team behind Bombshell are intent on pandering to Rebecca's celebrity status, but grow increasingly exasperated by her unprofessional behavior. Her first Appearance was in "The Movie Star" where after a long delay in Cuba, Rebecca arrives for her First rehearsal at the studios. However after the first rehearsal, Rebecca's ability to sing was 'not as expected' as her Agent told the production team otherwise. Tom's tolerance for her after several requests to alterations to the script, and changing the sequence of the Musical.

Her first Appearance was in "The Movie Star" where after a long delay in Cuba, Rebecca arrives for her First rehearsal at the studios. However after the first rehearsal, Rebecca's ability to sing was 'not as expected' as her Agent told the production team otherwise. Tom's tolerance for her after several requests to alterations to the script, and changing the sequence of the Musical.

characters.name: Sam Strickland
characters.description: Sam StricklandGeneral informationName:Sam StricklandProfession:ActorRelationships:Tom Levitt(ex-boyfriend)Portrayed by:Leslie Odom Jr. Sam Stricklandis first introduced into the series inThe Cost of Art, it is revealed that he andIvydidChicagotogether 10 years ago. He is the only dancer who was nice to Karen off the bat, complimenting on her voice. He even tells Ivy to cut down on being a 'diva' during rehearsals when she is trying to get Karen fired. He was datingTom Levitt, but they had to end the relationship since he was asked to take a part in theBook of Mormontour, which he took. He is a member of the New York City Gay Men's Chorus and is originally from Boston. He is a longtime musician, athlete and loves all sports. He began singing at the age of five and played Division II Football in college.

characters.name: Sue
characters.description:
SueGeneral informationName:SueProfession:Actress, Dancer & Singer.Relationships:Bobby(friend)Jessica(friend)Ivy Lynn(friend)Karen Cartwright(friend)Portrayed by:Jenny Laroche Sueis a recurring character in Smash. She is first seen inThe Cost of Artas ensemble member, alongsideKaren. She, with the help ofJessicaandBobby, befriend Karen and teacher how to be an ensemble member. InTech, she rooms with Karen while in Boston. She is often seen hanging out with the rest of the ensemble members especially Jessica & Bobby. Sue is a very outgoing and charismatic character and seems popular in the group. InBombshellshe is one of the fourShadow Selvesand is in the ensemble for most of the songs and scenes.
She is most likely to have performed as an ensemble member on Broadway for many years. During season 2 she is seen in the Bombshell numbers as a member of the chorus.
